name: zrndr_span_occlusion_init
description: zRndr::SpanOcclusionInit allocates span occlusion tables and pools, builds the initial column table, clears saved occluders, and installs span-list callbacks.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?SpanOcclusionInit@zRndr@@YIHH@Z at 0x490520 still fails: 41 unmasked mismatches, 52 relocation bytes masked, 1 trailing VC NOP byte trimmed, BN size 97 bytes, VC object symbol size 96 bytes.

Reviewed difference is allocation call setup and register scheduling drift around calloc, SpanOcclusionBuildColumnHeadTable, and callback installation. The native smoke verifies visible/padded column counts, allocations, initialized head table, callback pointers, and shutdown cleanup.
